title: Pandium Tenant
description: A Tenant represents a customer instance of an integration on the Pandium platform, with its own configuration, schedule, and connection credentials.

created_date.description: Date and time the tenant was created.

modified_date.description: Date and time the tenant was last modified.

user_schedule.description: The user-defined cron schedule for the tenant.

schedule.description: The effective schedule for the tenant.

source.description: The source of the tenant creation.

integration_release_id.description: ID of the integration release assigned to this tenant.

integration_release_channel.description: The release channel for the tenant.
